project_type: TanStack Start + React + Vite SSR app (Lovable prototype)
build_system: Vite 7 with @lovable.dev/vite-tanstack-config, bun as package manager
test_framework: None (no tests exist in this prototype)
verification_instructions: Run 'bun run build' to confirm TypeScript compilation and Vite bundling succeeds with no errors
snapshot_or_generated_files: src/routeTree.gen.ts is auto-generated by TanStack Router plugin during build. Do NOT manually edit it.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full access. No test suite exists. Verification is build-only.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md found. Lovable prototype with no formal contribution guidelines.
key_patterns: File-based routing in src/routes/. Auth via simple in-memory authStore (src/lib/auth-store.ts). Mock data in src/lib/data.ts. UI components from shadcn/radix in src/components/ui/. Navbar in src/components/navbar.tsx. TailwindCSS v4 for styling. Recharts for charts.
directory_structure: src/routes/ - file-based routes (TanStack Router). src/components/ - shared components including navbar and ui/ library. src/lib/ - utilities, auth store, mock data. src/assets/ - images.
